sections.paragraph:
Original: תּלשּׂר תּלאשּׂר

Transliteration: tela'śśar telaśśar

Phonetic: tel-as-sar'

BDB Definition:

Telassar or Thelasar = "Assyrian hill"
  1. a city conquered and held by the Assyrians located apparently in Mesopotamia

Origin: of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
